series_metadata.series_description: ORC – 2923.18 – File contains a yellow copy of a 30-day permit or 1-year license for an individual or company to purchase dynamite, automatic weapons, or any other dangerous weapons.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Microform: microfilm four (4) years ; Paper: Enter data in computer system, scan original document into machine readable format. Upon confirmation scanned copy has been checked quality and completeness, paper copy one (1) year issuance. ; Electronic: electronic records four (4) years
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
